column3: Reveals technical specifications of enemy spacecraft in combat.
Adds 1 level to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Detects enemy ships up to 5 parsecs away from your colonies and 1 parsec away from your ships.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 2.
Adds 2 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Allows up to three factories to be operated per population. The refit cost to upgrade to Robotic Controls III is half the standard cost of each factory.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 3.
Adds 3 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Detects enemy ships up to 7 parsecs away from your colonies and 2 parsecs away from your ships. Enemy destinations and ETA can also be accurately determined.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 4.
Adds 4 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Allows up to four factories to be operated per population. The refit cost to upgrade to Robotic Controls IV is the standard cost of each factory.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 5.
Adds 5 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Allows exploration of planets from colony bases up to 9 parsecs away and detects enemy ships up to 3 parsecs away from your ships.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 6.
Adds 6 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Allows up to five factories to be operated per population. The refit cost to upgrade to Robotic Controls V is one and a half times the standard cost of each factory.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 7.
Adds 7 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks..
Allows you to communicate with ships and transports in hyperspace, and change their destinations while in route.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 8.
Adds 8 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Allows up to six factories to be operated per population. The refit cost to upgrade to Robotic Controls VI is twice the standard cost of each factory.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 9.
Adds 9 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 10.
Coordinates all beam weapon attacks into one simultaneous burst of concentrated fire, halving the enemy's shield strength.
Adds 10 levels to defense against enemy missile attacks.
Allows up to seven factories to be operated per population. The refit cost to upgrade to Robotic Controls VII is 2.5 times the standard cost of each factory.
Scrambles enemy battle computers, reducing the level of the computers up to 2-6 levels each time the nullifier is fired. The weapon has a 4 space range.
Increases weapon accuracy to level 11.
Extends the range of a ship by an additional 3 parsecs.
Reduces factory construction costs to 9 BC each.
Decreases factory pollution levels to 80% of the normal rate.
Reduces factory construction costs to 8 BC each.
Increases the hit points of ships and transports by 50%. Personal combat armor is also enhanced, adding 5 to all ground attacks.
Armor that not only protects but also boosts strength. Adds 10 to all ground combat rolls.
Reduces factory construction costs to 7 BC each.
Undestroyed ships can repair up to 15% of their total hit points at the end of each turn.
Decreases factory pollution levels to 60% of the normal rate.
Increases the hit points of ships and transports by 100%. Personal combat armor is also enhanced, adding 10 to all ground attacks.
Reduces factory construction costs to 6 BC each.
Reduces factory construction costs to 5 BC each.
Advanced mobile suits that not only boost power and increase defenses but also offer limited flight to ground troops. Adds 20 to all ground combat rolls.
Decreases factory pollution levels to 40% of the normal rate.
Increases the hit points of ships and transports by 150%. Personal combat armor is also enhanced, adding 15 to all ground attacks.
Reduces factory construction costs to 4 BC each.
Reduces factory construction costs to 3 BC each.
Increases the hit points of ships and transports by 200%. Personal combat armor is also enhanced, adding 20 to all ground attacks.
Decreases factory pollution levels to 20% of the normal rate.
Undestroyed ships can repair up to 30% of their total hit points at the end of each turn.
Reduces factory construction costs to 2 BC each.
Combines high mobility, anti-grav flight, and heavy armored plating to form the most advanced armor available for ground troops. Adds 30 to all ground combat rolls.
Increases the hit points of ships and transports by 250%. Personal combat armor is also enhanced, adding 25 to all ground attacks.
Factories cease to pollute.
Provides the best internal protection of any armor and increases the hit points of a ship by 300%. Personal combat armor is also enhanced, adding 30 to all ground attacks.
Absorbs 1 point of damage from all attacks.
Absorbs 2 points of damage from all attacks.
Protects individual ground troops with a directional force field. Adds +10 to all ground combat battles.
Absorbs 3 points of damage from all attacks.
Absorbs 5 points of damage from attacks against planet surfaces, and is cumulative with missile base deflector shields.
Absorbs 4 points of damage from all attacks.
Repels enemy ships back one space away from the attacking ship. The special weapon has a 1 space range.
Absorbs 5 points of damage from all attacks.
Absorbs damage from all hand weapons. Adds 20 to all ground combat battles.
Absorbs 10 points of damage from all attacks against planet surfaces, and is cumulative with missile base deflector shields.
Absorbs 6 points of damage from all attacks.
Renders ships nearly invisible until they attack. While cloaked ships receive a +5 to their missile and beam defenses.
Absorbs 7 points of damage from all attacks.
An energy field that destroys incoming missiles and torpedoes 75% of the time, -1% per technology level of the missile.
Absorbs 15 points of damage from all attacks against planet surfaces, and is cumulative with missile base deflector shields.
Absorbs 9 points of damage from all attacks.
Freezes one group of enemy ships up to one space away, for one turn. Frozen ships cannot attack or be attacked.
Completely encases the soldier in an nearly impenetrable force field. Adds +30 to all ground combat rolls.
Absorbs 11 points of damage from all attacks.
Absorbs 20 points of damage from all attacks against planet surfaces, and is cumulative with missile base deflector shields.
Creates a sub-space field that warps normal space creating an instantaneous black hole, destroying 25%-100% of enemy ships, -2% per shield class.
Absorbs 13 points of damage from all attacks.
An energy field that destroys incoming enemy missiles and torpedoes 100% of the time, -1% per technology level of the missile.
Absorbs 15 points of damage from all attacks.
Eliminates 2 units of industrial waste for a cost of 1 BC.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 10M for a cost of 5 BC per million.
Permits the colonization of barren planets.
Eliminates 3 units of industrial waste for a cost of 1 BC.
Permits the colonization of tundra planets.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 20M for a cost of 5 BC per million.
Permits the colonization of dead planets.
Horrible biological weapons capable of reducing the maximum planetary populations by 1 million per attack.
Permits the colonization of inferno planets.
Eliminates 5 units of industrial waste for a cost of 1 BC.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 30M for a cost of 4 BC per million.
Permits the colonization of toxic planets.
Converts standard planets to fertile enviroments, increasing population growth by 50% and raising the base planetary size by +25% for a one time cost of 150 BC.
Reduces casualties taken from biological weapons by 1 million per attack.
Permits the colonization of radiated planets.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 40M for a cost of 4 BC per million.
Allows bio engineered colonists to be grown at a rate of 1M per 10 BC.
Converts hostile planets to standard minimal environments, normalizing population growth for a one time cost of 200 BC.
Eliminates 10 units of industrial waste for a cost of 1 BC.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 50M for a cost of 3 BC per million.
Dreadful biological weapons capable of reducing planetary populations by 2 million per attack.
Converts standard and fertile planets to gaias, doubling the population growth and increasing the planet's base size by +50% for the one time cost of 300 BC.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 60M for a cost of 3 BC per million.
Eliminates 20 units of industrial waste for a cost of 1 BC.
Reduces casualties taken from biological weapons by 2 million per attack.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 80M for a cost of 2 BC per million.
Abominable biological weapons capable of reducing planetary populations by 3 million per attack.
Allows bio engineered colonists to be grown at a rate of 1M per 5 BC.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 100M for a cost of 2 BC per million.
Increases the population capacity of planets by 120M for a cost of 2 BC per million.
Moves ships at warp one (1 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class I in combat.
Fuel reserves allow ships to move up to 4 parsecs away from colony planets.
Fuel reserves allow ships to move up to 5 parsecs away from colony planets.
Moves ships at warp two (2 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class II in combat.
Fuel reserves allow ships to move up to 6 parsecs away from colony planets.
Generates a field that reduces the inertia of ships, and adds 2 classes of maneuverability in combat (+2 defense and +1 combat speed).
Moves ships at warp three (3 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class III in combat.
Fuel reserves allow ships to move up to 7 parsecs away from colony planets.
A potent engine modification which generates a sudden spherical burst of energy striking all adjacent ships for up to 5 points of damage plus 1 per two ships.
Moves ships at warp four (4 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class IV in combat.
Fuel reserves allow ships to move up to 8 parsecs away from colony planets.
Specialized weapon that disrupts the warp fields surrounding enemy ships, reducing their speed by 0-1 each turn the weapon is fired.
Fuel reserves allow ships to move up to 9 parsecs away from colony planets.
Moves ships at warp five (5 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class V in combat.
Allows your ships to move between any two planets equipped with star gates in only one turn. Costs 3000 BC to build.
Fuel reserves allow ships to move up to 10 parsecs away from colony planets.
Moves ships at warp six (6 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class VI in combat.
Increases the firing range of all energy weapons by three.
Moves ships at warp seven (7 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class VII in combat.
Teleports ships to any space on the combat map and gives first initiative to the teleporting ship.
A powerful engine modification capable of generating a spherical burst of phased energy striking all adjacent ships for up to 10 points of damage plus one per ship.
Self-replenishing fuel that allows ships to move any distance from colony planets.
Moves ships at warp eight (8 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class VIII in combat.
Surrounds colony planets with an intense gravity well, rendering sub space teleporters useless and halving combat transporter effectiveness. The device is a placed in all missile bases.
Transports equipped with these devices have a 50% chance of beaming down onto enemy surfaces before the transports can be attacked by enemy ships and bases.
Generates a field that negates the inertia of ships and adds 2 classes of maneuverability in combat (+4 defense and +2 combat speed).
Moves ships at warp nine (9 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class IX in combat.
Randomly shifts the equipped ship in and out of normal space, allowing the ship to avoid one third of all non-area attacks.
Direct-fire beam weapon that inflicts 1-4 points of damage. Heavy lasers have a two space range and do 1-7 points of damage.
Personal lasers that add 5 to your ground combat rolls.
Swift missiles that explode for 6 points of damage and move at a speed of 2.5
An advanced laser that fires up to four times per turn for 1-4 points of damage with each hit.
Trans-light rockets capable of destroying incoming enemy missiles 40% of the time, -1% per technology level of the missile.
Heavy particle stream weapon that halves the effectiveness of enemy deflector shields and inflicts 2-5 points of damage.
Missiles equipped with high energy warheads that explode for 8 points of damage, move at a speed of 2.5, and are controlled by a +1 level targeting computer.
Bombs that explode for 5-20 points of damage on planetary targets only.
High intensity beam weapons capable of inflicting 3-8 points of damage. Heavy ion cannons strike for 3-15 and have a 2 space range.
Mirv versions of Hyper-V Rockets, splitting into five separate warheads that each explode for 6 points of damage and move at a speed of 2.5
Personal beam weapons that add 10 to your ground attacks.
A linear accelerator that halves the effectiveness of enemy deflector shields and inflicts 5-8 points of damage.
Hard-hitting, swift missiles that explode for 10 points of damage, move at a speed of 3, and are controlled by a +2 level targeting computer.
High powered beam weapons capable of inflicting 3-12 points of damage. Heavy neutron blasters strike for 3-24 points and have a 2 space range.
Bombs that explode for 10-40 points of damage on planetary targets only.
Tractor-repulsor beam capable of rending ships to pieces. The beam strikes for 1-15, and the continuous streaming effect of the ray allows damage to carry over from one ship to another.
Slow, hyper-accurate missiles that do 15 points of damage, move at a speed of 3.5, and are controlled by a sophisticated +3 level targeting computer.
An energy-to-matter beam weapon that halves the effectiveness of enemy deflector shields, and inflicts 8-12 points of damage.
High intensity beam weapon capable of doing 4-16 points of damage. Heavy fusion beams strike for 4-30 points and have a 2 space range.
Fires an intense ionic blast reducing an opponents armor by 20% plus 1% per two firing ships. The projector has a range of 2 spaces.
High yield bombs that explode for 20-50 points of damage on planetary targets only.
High energy tracking torpedoes that deliver 30 points of damage but may only be fired every other turn. Each torpedo is equipped with a +4 level targeting computer.
Inaccurate but incredibly powerful beam weapons that add 20 to your ground combat rolls.
Releases multiple bolts of pure energy in a wide field. It has a +30% bonus chance to hit and strikes for 2-20 points of damage.
Phased energy beams capable of inflicting 5-20 points of damage. Heavy phasors strike for 5-40 points of damage and have a 2 space range.
Mirv versions of Hyper-X Rockets, splitting into seven separate warheads that each explode for 10 points of damage, move at a speed of 3, and are guided by a +2 level targeting computer.
An advanced neutron blaster that fires up to three times per turn for 4-16 points of damage with each hit.
Powerful missiles equipped with anti-matter warheads that explode for 20 points of damage, move at speed 4, and are controlled by a +4 level targeting computer.
Fires an intense stream of tachyon particles that strike enemy ships for 1-25 hits. The continous streaming effect of the ray allows it to carry damage over from one ship to another.
Potent hand held energy weapons capable of reducing an opponent to his component atoms. Adds 25 to your ground combat rolls.
An advanced linear accelerator capable of firing four explosive rounds per turn that inflict 7-10 points of damage each. The projectile rounds half the effectiveness of enemy shields.
High intensity particle accelerators capable of striking enemy ships for 10-20 points of damage and halving the effectiveness of deflector shields.
Highly advanced missile that explodes for 25 points of damage. The hercular missile moves at speed 4.5 and is controlled by a +5 level targeting computer.
Fires intense bolts of energy that inflict 6-30 points of damage.
An ancient weapon of unbelievably destructive power that inflicts 200-1000 points of damage with a 1 space range.
Unleashes tremendous bolts of pure energy that can strike enemy targets up to 2 spaces away for 10-40 points of damage.
An advanced phasor capable of firing three bursts per turn for 5-20 points of damage with each hit.
Devastating bombs that explode for 40-70 points of damage on planets only.
Enveloping energy torpedoes that simultaneously strike all shields, delivering damage equivalent to four 25 point attacks. They may only be fired once every other turn.
Most advanced missile available. Capable of striking enemy ships for 30 points of damage and moving at a speed of 5. The zeon missile is guided by a +6 level targeting computer.
The most devastating hand held weapon available. Adds 30 to your ground attacks.
High yield energy torpedoes that deliver 75 points of damage but may only be fired every other turn. Each torpedo is equipped with a +6 level targeting computer.
Mirv versions of Stinger Missiles, splitting into ten separate warheads that each explode for 15 points of damage, move at speed 3.5, and are guided by a +3 level targeting computer.
Fires a triad of high intensity plasma beams capable of inflicting 20-50 points of damage.
Surrounds the target with an extremely powerful matter-energy conversion field, inflicting four 10-35 point attacks.  It has a range of 3 spaces.
Fires a blast of concentrated neutrino rays reducing an opponents armor by 40% plus 1% per firing ship. The projector has a range of 2 spaces.
Unleashes enormous amounts of focused energy at enemy targets, inflicting 20-100 points of damage.
Pure energy torpedoes that deliver 150 points of damage, but lose 15 strength per space traveled. The launcher fires every other turn and has a +7 level guidance computer.
